column1: 長年の夢だっただけに、合格した時の喜びは格別だった。
column2: ながねんのゆめだっただけに、ごうかくしたときのよろこびはかくべつだった。
column3: Because it had been his dream for so many years, the joy of finally achieving it was indescribable.
column4: だけに (precisely because, all the more because, as might be expected from)
column6: だけに: long-standing nature amplifies depth of joy
column7: だけに: long-standing nature amplifies depth of joy
column8: だけに = result is natural/amplified given specific factor; だからこそ = precisely because (emphasizing cause); だけあって = as expected from that quality; それだけに = for that very reason
